final:
// // This comment suggests the counter decrements on a high U_D signal
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input U_D,
    output reg [3:0] Q
);always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (U_D == 1'b1) begin
            Q <= Q + 1;
        end
        else begin
            Q <= Q - 1;
        end
    end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This comment suggests the counter decrements on a high U_D signal
